'''âd-z-m-k''' ('''kadazmekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turgesce|turgesce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turgesce|turgesce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-z-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadazmekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazmekoko|thidazmekoko]] || [[word:jidazmekoko|jidazmekoko]] || [[word:shidazmekoko|shidazmekoko]] || [[word:kidazmekoko|kidazmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazmekoko|thuthudazmekoko]] || [[word:jujudazmekoko|jujudazmekoko]] || [[word:shushudazmekoko|shushudazmekoko]] || [[word:kukudazmekoko|kukudazmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudazmekoko|thudazmekoko]] || [[word:judazmekoko|judazmekoko]] || [[word:shudazmekoko|shudazmekoko]] || [[word:kudazmekoko|kudazmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudazmekoko|thudazmekoko]] || [[word:judazmekoko|judazmekoko]] || [[word:shudazmekoko|shudazmekoko]] || [[word:kudazmekoko|kudazmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedazmekoko|thedazmekoko]] || [[word:jedazmekoko|jedazmekoko]] || [[word:shedazmekoko|shedazmekoko]] || [[word:kedazmekoko|kedazmekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodazmekoko|thodazmekoko]] || [[word:jodazmekoko|jodazmekoko]] || [[word:shodazmekoko|shodazmekoko]] || [[word:kodazmekoko|kodazmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazmekoko|thodazmekoko]] || [[word:jodazmekoko|jodazmekoko]] || [[word:shodazmekoko|shodazmekoko]] || [[word:kodazmekoko|kodazmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdazmekoko|thĂŠdazmekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdazmekoko|jĂŠdazmekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdazmekoko|shĂŠdazmekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdazmekoko|kĂŠdazmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadazmekoko|thathadazmekoko]] || [[word:jajadazmekoko|jajadazmekoko]] || [[word:shashadazmekoko|shashadazmekoko]] || [[word:kakadazmekoko|kakadazmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazmekoko|thadazmekoko]] || [[word:jadazmekoko|jadazmekoko]] || [[word:shadazmekoko|shadazmekoko]] || [[word:kadazmekoko|kadazmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazmekoko|thadazmekoko]] || [[word:jadazmekoko|jadazmekoko]] || [[word:shadazmekoko|shadazmekoko]] || [[word:kadazmekoko|kadazmekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadazmekithi|shadazmekithi]] || [[word:shadazmekiji|shadazmekiji]] || [[word:shadazmekishi|shadazmekishi]] || [[word:shadazmekiki|shadazmekiki]]
